preamble: Prothesis of the voiceless velar fricative [x] occurs in various Spanish dialects and in the historical development of certain languages as a reinforcement of initial glides or vowels.

examples.note: Velar [x] inserted before initial /w/ in Andean/Southern Spanish dialects. Cf. Canfield's documentation of this in Latin American dialects.
Same prothetic pattern before /w/ from Latin 'olfacio'.
